en: "If a man steals an ox or a sheep, and kills it or sells it, he shall repay five oxen for an ox, and four sheep for a sheep.
zh: “如果人偷了牛或是羊，無論是宰了或是賣了，他必須賠償，以五牛還一牛，以四羊還一羊。

en: "If a thief is found breaking in and is struck so that he dies, there shall be no bloodguilt for him,
zh: “竊賊挖窟窿入屋的時候，如果被人發現，把他打了，以致打死，打死人的就沒有流人血的罪。

en: but if the sun has risen on him, there shall be bloodguilt for him. He shall surely pay. If he has nothing, then he shall be sold for his theft.
zh: 如果太陽出來了，他就有流人血的罪。竊賊必須賠償，如果他一無所有，就要賣身，還他所偷之物。

en: If the stolen beast is found alive in his possession, whether it is an ox or a donkey or a sheep, he shall pay double.
zh: 所偷之物，無論是牛、是驢，或是羊，如果發現在他手中仍然活著，他必須雙倍償還。

en: "If a man causes a field or vineyard to be grazed over, or lets his beast loose and it feeds in another man's field, he shall make restitution from the best in his own field and in his own vineyard.
zh: 如果有人在田間或葡萄園裡放牲畜吃草，任由牲畜到別人的田裡去吃草，就必須拿自己田間最好的，或自己葡萄園中最好的賠償。

en: "If fire breaks out and catches in thorns so that the stacked grain or the standing grain or the field is consumed, he who started the fire shall make full restitution.
zh: “如果火燒起來，燒著了荊棘，以致把別人堆積的禾捆、豎立的莊稼，或是田園都燒盡了，那點火的必須賠償。

en: "If a man gives to his neighbor money or goods to keep safe, and it is stolen from the man's house, then, if the thief is found, he shall pay double.
zh: “如果人把銀子或家中物件交給鄰舍看守，這些東西從那人的家被偷去；如果把竊賊抓到了，竊賊就要雙倍償還。

en: If the thief is not found, the owner of the house shall come near to God to show whether or not he has put his hand to his neighbor's property.
zh: 如果找不到竊賊，那家主必要到審判官 那裡，查明他有沒有下手拿去鄰舍的財物。

en: For every breach of trust, whether it is for an ox, for a donkey, for a sheep, for a cloak, or for any kind of lost thing, of which one says, 'This is it,' the case of both parties shall come before God. The one whom God condemns shall pay double to his neighbor.
zh: 任何爭訟的案件，無論是為了牛、驢、羊、衣服，或是甚麼遺失了的東西，如果一方說：‘這是我的’，這樣，雙方的案件就要帶到審判官 面前，審判官定誰有罪，誰就要雙倍償還給他的鄰舍。

en: "If a man gives to his neighbor a donkey or an ox or a sheep or any beast to keep safe, and it dies or is injured or is driven away, without anyone seeing it,
zh: “如果人把驢、牛、羊，或是任何牲畜交給鄰舍看守，牲畜死亡、受傷，或是被趕去，又沒有人看見，

en: an oath by the LORD shall be between them both to see whether or not he has put his hand to his neighbor's property. The owner shall accept the oath, and he shall not make restitution.
zh: 兩人必須在耶和華面前起誓，表明他沒有下手拿去鄰舍的財物；如果物主接受那誓言，看守的人就不必賠償。

en: But if it is stolen from him, he shall make restitution to its owner.
zh: 如果牲畜真的從看守的人那裡被偷去，他就要賠償給物主。

en: If it is torn by beasts, let him bring it as evidence. He shall not make restitution for what has been torn.
zh: 如果真的被野獸撕碎了，看守的人就要把被撕碎的帶來作證據，這樣，他就不必賠償。

en: "If a man borrows anything of his neighbor, and it is injured or dies, the owner not being with it, he shall make full restitution.
zh: “如果人向鄰舍借甚麼，所借的無論是受了傷，或是死了，物主不在場，借的人就必須償還。

en: If the owner was with it, he shall not make restitution; if it was hired, it came for its hiring fee.
zh: 如果物主在場，他就不必償還；若是雇來的，也不必償還，因為他為雇價來的。

en: "If a man seduces a virgin who is not engaged to be married and lies with her, he shall give the bride-price for her and make her his wife.
zh: “如果人引誘還沒有許配人的處女，與她同寢，他必須交出聘禮，娶她為妻。

en: If her father utterly refuses to give her to him, he shall pay money equal to the bride-price for virgins.
zh: 如果處女的父親堅決不肯把女兒嫁給他，他就要按照處女的聘禮，交出聘銀來。

en: "You shall not permit a sorceress to live.
zh: “不可讓行巫術的女人活著。

en: "Whoever lies with an animal shall be put to death.
zh: “凡與牲畜同寢的，那人必須處死。

en: "Whoever sacrifices to any god, other than the LORD alone, shall be devoted to destruction.
zh: “除了獨一的耶和華以外，還獻祭給別神的，那人必須滅絕。

en: "You shall not wrong a sojourner or oppress him, for you were sojourners in the land of Egypt.
zh: 不可欺負寄居的，也不可壓迫他，因為你們在埃及地也作過寄居的。

en: You shall not mistreat any widow or fatherless child.
zh: 不可苦待任何孤兒寡婦。

en: If you do mistreat them, and they cry out to me, I will surely hear their cry,
zh: 如果你們真的苦待他們，他們一向我呼求，我必定聽他們的呼求，

en: and my wrath will burn, and I will kill you with the sword, and your wives shall become widows and your children fatherless.
zh: 並且我要發怒，用刀殺死你們，使你們的妻子成為寡婦，你們的兒女成為孤兒。

en: "If you lend money to any of my people with you who is poor, you shall not be like a moneylender to him, and you shall not exact interest from him.
zh: “如果你借錢給我的人民，就是與你們在一起的窮人，你對待他們不可像放債的人一樣，不可在他們身上取利。

en: If ever you take your neighbor's cloak in pledge, you shall return it to him before the sun goes down,
zh: 如果你拿了鄰居的衣服作抵押，必須在日落之前歸還給他。

en: for that is his only covering, and it is his cloak for his body; in what else shall he sleep? And if he cries to me, I will hear, for I am compassionate.
zh: 因為這是他唯一的鋪蓋，是他蔽體的衣服；如果沒有了它，他拿甚麼睡覺呢？如果他向我呼求，我必應允，因為我是滿有恩惠的。

en: "You shall not revile God, nor curse a ruler of your people.
zh: “不可咒罵 神，也不可咒詛你人民的領袖。

en: "You shall not delay to offer from the fullness of your harvest and from the outflow of your presses. The firstborn of your sons you shall give to me.
zh: 要把你豐收的五穀和初榨的新酒獻上，不可遲延；要把你頭生的兒子獻給我。

en: You shall do the same with your oxen and with your sheep: seven days it shall be with its mother; on the eighth day you shall give it to me.
zh: 對於牛羊頭生的，你也要這樣作；七天之內，可以和母的在一起，第八天就要把牠獻給我。

en: "You shall be consecrated to me. Therefore you shall not eat any flesh that is torn by beasts in the field; you shall throw it to the dogs.
zh: 你們要歸我作聖潔的人；因此田間被野獸撕碎的肉，你們不可以吃，要把它丟給狗吃。”
